name: CyanAutomation-kaseki-agent
description: Kaseki is a proof-of-concept ephemeral coding-agent runner. Each run is a numbered, disposable container instance such as kaseki-1 or kaseki-2. This template uses the Pi coding-agent CLI with OpenRouter.
